inputs: Six class-stratified, exact/strict-graded prompt tasks standing in for the fleet's real routing task classes: structured extraction, instruction following, format discipline (strict JSON), pattern output, arithmetic reasoning, and field lookup. Held constant across environments so the only thing that varies between runs is the model/config under test.
outputs: Model text graded by deterministic exact/strict-json/regex rubrics. No judge model is called, so the score is reproducible and free to grade.
decision: Which model the lead routes a given task class to at dispatch time, replacing routing-by-vibes with a scored, interval-bearing comparison across environments.

config.system_prompt: You are running an exact-match routing benchmark. Output exactly the requested answer and nothing else: no markdown, no code fences, no quotes unless the answer itself contains them, no explanation, no leading or trailing prose.

tasks.prompt: From this config line return exactly the model slug and nothing else: provider=open_router model=z-ai/glm-5.2 temp=0
Reply with the single word READY in uppercase, and nothing else.
Return a JSON object with exactly two string fields: name set to crucible and kind set to eval. Output only the JSON.
Output only the semantic version string for major version 2, minor version 1, patch version 0.
Compute (12 * 3) - 7 and return only the resulting integer.
From this JSON return exactly the value of owner.email and nothing else: {"owner":{"name":"Mira","email":"mira@example.test"},"repo":"crucible"}
